message:
feat(core): add mmap/poll/process modules, rewrite stdio buffer+file+printf engines, refactor pthread to validators

Three new core modules provide pure-Rust constants, validators, and sanitizers:

- mmap/mod.rs: POSIX <sys/mman.h> constants (PROT_READ/WRITE/EXEC/NONE,
  MAP_SHARED/PRIVATE/FIXED/ANONYMOUS, MS_ASYNC/SYNC/INVALIDATE,
  MADV_NORMAL/RANDOM/SEQUENTIAL/WILLNEED/DONTNEED) with validators that
  enforce correct flag combinations (e.g. exactly one of SHARED/PRIVATE)
  and sanitizers that default to safe values (PROT_READ, MAP_PRIVATE,
  MS_ASYNC, MADV_NORMAL). MAP_FAILED = usize::MAX. 12 unit tests.

- poll/mod.rs: POSIX <poll.h> and <sys/select.h> constants (POLLIN/OUT/ERR/
  HUP/NVAL/RDNORM/WRNORM/PRI, FD_SETSIZE=1024) with validators that
  distinguish input-requestable vs output-only event flags, nfds bounds
  (1M for poll, FD_SETSIZE for select), and timeout reasonability (<=24h).
  Clampers for hardened mode. 7 unit tests.

- process/mod.rs: POSIX <sys/wait.h> wait-status decoding macros (WIFEXITED,
  WEXITSTATUS, WIFSIGNALED, WTERMSIG, WIFSTOPPED, WSTOPSIG) matching the
  glibc bit layout. Wait option constants (WNOHANG, WUNTRACED, WCONTINUED)
  with validator and sanitizer. Exit status clamper ([0,255]). Signal range
  validator ([1,64]). 7 unit tests.

stdio subsystem rewritten from stubs to a complete buffered I/O engine:

- buffer.rs: Clean-room POSIX stdio buffering with three modes (Full/Line/
  None matching _IOFBF/_IOLBF/_IONBF). StreamBuffer implements a bounded
  ring with explicit read/write cursors, monotonic state tracking to prevent
  illegal mode transitions after I/O has started, and configurable capacity
  (default BUFSIZ=8192). Reference: POSIX.1-2024 setvbuf, ISO C11 7.21.3.

- file.rs: StdioStream type wrapping fd + OpenFlags + read/write StreamBuffers.
  parse_mode() handles the full POSIX mode string grammar (r/w/a/r+/w+/a+
  with optional 'b'). flags_to_oflags() converts to O_RDONLY/WRONLY/RDWR/
  CREAT/TRUNC/APPEND. Methods: buffered_read, buffer_write (returns flush
  data when buffer fills or newline in line mode), pending_flush, mark_flushed,
  prepare_close, prepare_seek, set_offset/offset, is_eof/is_error/set_eof/
  set_error/clear_err, fill_read_buffer, ungetc, set_buffering. BufMode
  exposed with from_posix() conversion.

- printf.rs: Full format string parser and renderer covering all standard
  conversions (%d/%i/%u/%x/%X/%o/%f/%F/%e/%E/%g/%G/%a/%A/%c/%s/%p/%n/%%),
  all flags (-/+/space/0/#), width (fixed/from-arg *), precision (fixed/
  from-arg *), and all length modifiers (hh/h/l/ll/j/z/t/L). FormatSpec,
  FormatFlags, Width, Precision, LengthMod, FormatSegment types are all
  pub for use by the ABI layer's variadic extraction. format_signed handles
  i64::MIN correctly. format_float delegates to Rust's standard formatting
  for correctness. format_pointer emits 0x-prefixed lowercase hex or (nil).
  Comprehensive test suite: 14 tests covering padding, precision, alternate
  forms, and edge cases.

- mod.rs: Re-exports the new public types (BufMode, OpenFlags, StdioStream,
  flags_to_oflags, parse_mode, FormatSegment, FormatSpec, FormatFlags, Width,
  Precision, LengthMod, format_signed/unsigned/float/char/str/pointer,
  parse_format_string).

- scanf.rs: Stub renamed from todo!()-panicking scanf() to scanf_stub()
  returning 0; documents that scanf shares structural similarity with printf
  but operates in reverse and will be implemented in a future phase.

pthread subsystem refactored from todo!()-panicking opaque types to
constants + validators:

- mutex.rs: PTHREAD_MUTEX_NORMAL(0)/RECURSIVE(1)/ERRORCHECK(2)/DEFAULT(=NORMAL)
  constants, valid_mutex_type() and sanitize_mutex_type() validators. Opaque
  PthreadMutex/PthreadMutexAttr types and function stubs removed. 3 tests.

- cond.rs: PTHREAD_COND_CLOCK_REALTIME(0)/MONOTONIC(1) constants,
  valid_cond_clock() and sanitize_cond_clock() validators. Opaque PthreadCond/
  PthreadCondAttr types and function stubs removed. 3 tests.

- rwlock.rs: PTHREAD_RWLOCK_DEFAULT_NP(0)/PREFER_READER_NP(0)/PREFER_WRITER_NP(1)/
  PREFER_WRITER_NONRECURSIVE_NP(2) constants, valid_rwlock_kind() and
  sanitize_rwlock_kind() validators. Opaque PthreadRwlock/PthreadRwlockAttr
  types and function stubs removed. 3 tests.

- mod.rs: Updated re-exports from function stubs to constant/validator symbols.
  Module doc updated to reflect delegation-to-libc architecture.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,12 @@
 //! scanf family functions.
-//! Implementation pending.
+//!
+//! Implementation pending. The scanf format string parser shares structural
+//! similarity with printf but operates in reverse (parsing input rather than
+//! generating output). A clean-room implementation will be added in a future
+//! phase, following the same spec-first methodology.
 
-pub fn scanf(_fmt: &[u8]) -> i32 {
-    todo!()
+// Placeholder: no-op that returns 0 items scanned.
+// The ABI layer falls back to libc::sscanf for bootstrap.
+pub fn scanf_stub() -> i32 {
+    0
 }
